# rubrik_cluster_settings (Data Source)

The `rubrik_cluster_settings` data source returns the upgrade state of a
single Rubrik cluster registered with RSC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "rubrik_cluster_settings" "cluster" {
  cluster_id = "db34f042-79ea-48b1-bab8-c40dfbf2ab82"
}

output "installed_version" {
  value = data.rubrik_cluster_settings.cluster.version
}

output "upgrade_status" {
  value = data.rubrik_cluster_settings.cluster.upgrade_status_v2.rsc_cluster_upgrade_status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) Cluster UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `fast_upgrade_preferred` (Boolean) True if the cluster is configured for FAST upgrades; false for ROLLING.
- `last_upgrade_duration` (Attributes) Duration in seconds of the last successful upgrade, by mode. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--last_upgrade_duration))
- `name` (String) Cluster name.
- `rolling_upgrade_supported` (Boolean) True if the cluster supports rolling upgrades.
- `upgrade_status_v2` (Attributes) Authoritative upgrade status of the cluster. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--upgrade_status_v2))
- `version` (String) Currently installed CDM version.

<a id="nestedatt--last_upgrade_duration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `last_upgrade_duration`

Read-Only:

- `fast_upgrade_duration` (Number) Last successful FAST upgrade duration, in seconds.
- `rolling_upgrade_duration` (Number) Last successful ROLLING upgrade duration, in seconds.


<a id="nestedatt--upgrade_status_v2"></a>
### Nested Schema for `upgrade_status_v2`

Read-Only:

- `rsc_cluster_upgrade_status` (String) RSC cluster upgrade status.
- `ui_status_attributes` (Attributes) Detailed attributes of the current upgrade status. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--upgrade_status_v2--ui_status_attributes))

<a id="nestedatt--upgrade_status_v2--ui_status_attributes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `upgrade_status_v2.ui_status_attributes`

Read-Only:

- `error_msg` (String) Error message for the current upgrade status, if any.
- `progress` (Number) Upgrade progress percentage.
- `source_version` (String) Version being upgraded from.
- `target_version` (String) Version being upgraded to.
- `upgrade_mode` (String) Upgrade mode (FAST or ROLLING).
